qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_enfermedad as oi_enfermedad, t0.c_enfermedad as c_enfermedad, t0.d_enfermedad as d_enfermedad, SEC.policy, t0.c_enfermedad as CODE, t0.d_enfermedad as TEXT FROM MED06_ENFERMEDADES as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.MedicinaLaboral.Enfermedades.ENFERMEDAD\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_enfermedad LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_enfermedad asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_enfermedad as oi_enfermedad, SEC.policy FROM MED06_ENFERMEDADES as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.MedicinaLaboral.Enfermedades.ENFERMEDAD\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_enfermedad LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_enfermedad asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.MedicinaLaboral.Enfermedades.ENFERMEDAD.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.MedicinaLaboral.Enfermedades.ENFERMEDAD.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(MED06_ENFERMEDADES.oi_enfermedad) as CNT from MED06_ENFERMEDADES Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and MED06_ENFERMEDADES.oi_enfermedad={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(MED06_ENFERMEDADES.d_enfermedad,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(MED06_ENFERMEDADES.c_enfermedad,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT MED06_ENFERMEDADES.oi_enfermedad as ID, MED06_ENFERMEDADES.c_enfermedad as COD, MED06_ENFERMEDADES.d_enfermedad as DES, MED06_ENFERMEDADES.c_enfermedad as c_enfermedad, MED06_ENFERMEDADES.d_enfermedad as d_enfermedad FROM MED06_ENFERMEDADES WHERE MED06_ENFERMEDADES.oi_enfermedad in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})')/ROWS/ROW
